steps: Whisk the eggs and a spoonful of flour with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour into the pan and cook, stirring gently, until just set, folding in the butter, ricotta, vanilla and lemon at the end.

name: Classic Southern Style Potato Salad
steps: Sauté the onion in a pan for 3-4 min.
Whisk the eggs with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour into the pan and cook, stirring gently, until just set, folding in the mayo and vinegar at the end.
Stir in the potato as well.
